programme.title: Any Day Now
programme.desc: An Iranian family remains optimistic as they appeal their denied application for asylum in Finland. 2020. Finland. Director: Hamy Ramezan. Starring: Aran-Sina Keshvari, Shahab Hosseini.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: Totone trades in teenagehood to provide for his kid sister, turning to cheese making for a steady income. 2024. France. Director: Louise Courvoisier. Starring: Clement Faveau, Maiwene Barthelemy.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: The true story of Rob Pilatus and Fab Morvan, who conquered the music charts as the pop duo 'Milli Vanilli'. 2023. Germany. Director: Simon Verhoeven. Starring: Tijan Njie.

programme.title: Tetsuo: The Bullet Man
programme.desc: After his son's death, Anthony's emotions begin to fester, turning him into something unrecognisable. 2009. Japan. Director: Shinya Tsukamoto. Starring: Eric Bossick, Akiko Monou.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man left battling anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down the man who murdered his wife. 2000. United States. Director: Christopher Nolan. Starring: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Within The Pines
programme.desc: Sound recordist, Sam Evans, is recording in a remote forrest when he hears a blood curdling scream. 2024. Australia. Director: Paul Evans Thomas. Starring: Brendan Cooney, Barrie Cotton.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A critic, an actress, and the owner of a newspaper become entangled in a web of lies following a murder. 2023. UK, USA. Director: Arnand Tucker. Starring: Ian McKellen, Gemma Arterton.

programme.title: Stella: A Life
programme.desc: Despite growing up in Germany during the Nazi regime, German-Jew Stella dreams of a career as a jazz singer. 2023. Germany. Director: Kilian Riedhof. Starring: Paula Beer, Bekim Latifi.

programme.title: Mozart's Sister
programme.desc: The story of the other Mozart, Maria-Anna, a child prodigy forgotten to time. 2024. Australia. Director: Madeleine Hetherton-Miau.

programme.title: Blanquita
programme.desc: Chilean orphan Blanquita becomes the key witness in a high-profile child trafficking scandal. 2022. Chile, Mexico. Director: Fernando Guzzoni. Starring: Laura Lopez, Alejandro Goic.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A critic, an actress, and the owner of a newspaper become entangled in a web of lies following a murder. 2023. UK, USA. Director: Arnand Tucker. Starring: Ian McKellen, Gemma Arterton.

programme.title: Tetsuo: The Bullet Man
programme.desc: After his son's death, Anthony's emotions begin to fester, turning him into something unrecognisable. 2009. Japan. Director: Shinya Tsukamoto. Starring: Eric Bossick, Akiko Monou.

programme.title: Within The Pines
programme.desc: Sound recordist, Sam Evans, is recording in a remote forrest when he hears a blood curdling scream. 2024. Australia. Director: Paul Evans Thomas. Starring: Brendan Cooney, Barrie Cotton.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: The true story of Rob Pilatus and Fab Morvan, who conquered the music charts as the pop duo 'Milli Vanilli'. 2023. Germany. Director: Simon Verhoeven. Starring: Tijan Njie.

programme.title: Bread And Roses: Part 1
programme.desc: Set in WWII New Zealand, Sonja returns to work as a single mother when sickness strikes. 1993. New Zealand. Director: Gaylene Preston. Starring: Genevieve Picot, Mick Rose.

programme.title: Bread And Roses: Part 2
